name: reflection
description: A self-improving codebase reflection loop. Reflect on one question, find one issue, propose a minimal fix, log it.

interface.shortDescription: Reflect on the codebase. Find one issue, propose a minimal fix, log it.
interface.longDescription: A deliberate, feedback-driven self-improvement loop. Each round reflects on one randomly chosen question about the codebase, surfaces one validated issue, proposes a minimal fix for approval, and logs the outcome to reflection-changelog.md.
defaultPrompt: Reflect on this codebase: pick one question, find one issue, propose a minimal fix.
